title: HotSite
description: HotStaq app configuration. v0.9.0 adds routes[].preload, routes[].staticRender, and partials[] for the --static build target.

partials.description: Explicit partial manifest for build-time Hot.include() resolution under --static. Optional; compiler also auto-discovers string-literal include targets.

preload.description: Preload tier. eager: inline in index.html shell. lazy: chunk prefetched on hover/focus. never: chunk loads on click only.

staticRender.description: When true, the compiler runs this route's preamble at build time against fixtures and bakes the resulting HTML into the template stash. Route must still be preload: eager.

fixtures.description: Path to a JSON fixtures file. Used when staticRender is true.

fixturesApi.description: Live preview API URL the compiler calls to obtain fixture data. Used when staticRender is true.

fixturesScript.description: Path to a script that returns fixture data. Used when staticRender is true.

id.description: Stable ID used in the <template id='hot-partial-{id}'> stash.

src.description: Path to the partial .hott file, relative to publicDir.
